zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecily de Ufford於1327年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親Robert de Ufford I29歲，母親Margaret Norwich30歲。她於1343年與John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年3月29日在英國林可爾史爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecily de Ufford于1327年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，她的父亲Robert de Ufford I29岁，母亲Margaret Norwich30岁。她于1343年与John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年3月29日在英国林可爾史爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecily de Ufford was born in 1327, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Ufford I, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Norwich, was 30. She married John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby in 1343. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 March 1372, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Cecily de Ufford est née en 1327, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ufford I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Norwich, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby en 1343. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 mars 1372, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Cecily de Ufford 1327 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Ufford I 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Norwich 30. Sie hat 1343 John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. März 1372 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily de Ufford è nata il nel 1327 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Ufford I, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Norwich, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby nel 1343. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 marzo 1372, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily de Uffordが1327年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford Iは29歳，母Margaret Norwichは30歳であった。1343年にJohn Willoughby III Lord Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1372年3月29日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで45歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビースト. ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily de Ufford(이)가 1327년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Ufford I(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Norwich(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1343년 John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 3월 29일 영국 링코실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스피스비 스트. 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily de Ufford nasceu em 1327, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ufford I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Norwich, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby em 1343. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de março de 1372, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecily de Ufford родилась в 1327 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Ufford I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Norwich, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby в 1343 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 марта 1372 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности ст. джемесь, спилсби, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Cecily de Ufford nació en 1327, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ufford I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Norwich, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby en 1343. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1372, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
